mapper.select: SELECT BIN_TO_UUID(id) AS id, BIN_TO_UUID(conversation_id) AS conversationId, BIN_TO_UUID(source_message_id) AS sourceMessageId, idempotency_key AS idempotencyKey, status, BIN_TO_UUID(job_id) AS jobId, version, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM control_turn WHERE idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey}

SELECT BIN_TO_UUID(id) AS id, BIN_TO_UUID(control_turn_id) AS controlTurnId, BIN_TO_UUID(source_message_id) AS sourceMessageId, BIN_TO_UUID(job_id) AS jobId, intent_type AS intentType, confidence, classifier, goal_summary AS goalSummary, decision_summary AS decisionSummary, CAST(constraints_json AS CHAR) AS constraintsJson, requires_clarification AS requiresClarification, compound_task AS compoundTask, risk_level AS riskLevel, created_at AS createdAt FROM control_decision WHERE control_turn_id = #{controlTurnId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO control_turn ( id, conversation_id, source_message_id, idempotency_key, status ) VALUES ( #{controlTurnId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{conversationId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{sourceMessageId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{idempotencyKey}, 'INITIALIZING' )
mapper.update: UPDATE control_turn SET job_id = #{jobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{controlTurnId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'INITIALIZING'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO control_decision ( id, control_turn_id, conversation_id, source_message_id, job_id, intent_type, confidence, classifier, goal_summary, decision_summary, constraints_json, task_graph_json, requires_clarification, compound_task, risk_level ) VALUES ( #{decisionId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{controlTurnId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{conversationId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{sourceMessageId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{jobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{recognition.intentType}, #{recognition.confidence}, #{recognition.classifier}, #{recognition.goalSummary}, #{recognition.decisionSummary}, CAST(#{constraintsJson} AS JSON), CASE WHEN #{taskGraphJson} IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST(#{taskGraphJson} AS JSON) END, #{recognition.requiresClarification}, #{recognition.compoundTask}, #{recognition.riskLevel} )
mapper.update: UPDATE control_turn SET status = 'COMPLETED', version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{controlTurnId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'INITIALIZING'
